entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deploy...
entry.content:
This is the issue:

"The url which gives the error is localhost:5000/{serviceRoute} the one that calls is localhost:4004"

Change your UI application to only make requests the same origin as it is served from. Let approuter which serves it route the requests to the correct url/destination.

entry.title: Re: SAC - how to trigger my input parameter to run the mo...
entry.content:
Probably you can try to use setVariableValue API to achieve this. 

https://help.sap.com/doc/1639cb9ccaa54b2592224df577abe822/release/en-US/index.html#DataSource_MsetVariableValue

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deploy...
entry.content:
when I try to make request to port 4004 where the main application is running the service request give 404. in approuter I am calling the correct destination which is a deployed service on BTP

"autoService": {
"uri": "http://localhost:5000/v2/odata/v4/automation/",
"type": "OData",
"settings": {
"annotations": [],
"odataVersion": "2.0"
}
}
this is what datasource looks like in manifest

entry.title: In the Activate Exam they ask what is need to estimate the backlog. What is the answer
entry.content: I have searched in all learning material and cannot find the answer

entry.title: Re: How to use lock objects in Developer Extensibility
entry.content:
This does not mean that an error has occurred. If the processing is going well, executing line 78 should not update the data in the target range, but it does. I confirmed this on the Preview screen of the Fiori created with RAP.

Are you referring to the settings of the lock object? I have attached that below. Please let me know again if this is not what you intended.

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deploy...
entry.content: You should not add hostname in the uri property of data source. Typical CAP (development) server setup only allows for requests to one (the same) CAP application. If you want to connect to two CAP application you need to access the application using a reverse proxy that will route the requests correctly; either use approuter or use backend proxy in Fiori/UI5 tools.

entry.title: Re: Create Subscription Quote Based On a Specific Configu...
entry.content:
Hi,

With introduction of multi-level AVC with BOM feature in S/4HANA 2023 FPS0, configuration date can be assigned/ updated in the subscription item while creating the subscription order as well as solution quotation. Help documentation provides useful information on the same Multi-Level Configuration of Product Bundles Using Advanced Variant Configuration | SAP Help Portal

In 2023 FPS1 and FPS2, multi-level AVC with BOM are also supported via API and in master agreement. Subscription order: API_SUBSCRIPTIONORDER
Solution Quotation: API_BUS_SOLUTION_QUOTATION_SRV

Regards
Deepak

entry.title: Re: Clear Facts & Classic Story BUG
entry.content: Is it a planning model or analytics model?

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deployed service
entry.content: @Dinu the localhost:5000 is the url to the local approuter. which I am using to redirect to the deployed link of the CAP service. Even after using approuter I am getting the CORS issue

entry.title: Re: EHS Duplicate Resource Error in Identify Risk app
entry.content:
Dear Ali,

it seems that something went wrong with the risk identification in the first place. In general, the combination of the following attributes must be unique (and is enforced by the system to be unique):

  • Location,
  • Operational Status,
  • Hazard,
  • Job,
  • Chemical (if applicable),
  • Method of Use (if applicable).

Therefore, the identified risk Corrosion (Diethylaluminum Chloride, Welding) violates the above constraint. Normally, it should not have been possible to identify the same risk twice - on the second try, an error message should have been shown.

"Risk with hazard Corrosion already exists"

I'd run the following checks to see what went wrong or to identify the root cause of the issue:

  1. Check if the duplicate is also a duplicate on the database. Please open transaction SE16N, and have a look at the table EHHSSD_RSK_ROOT - put in the filters to search for the Chemical, Method of Use, and Hazard. If this is an actual duplicate - try to reproduce the issue on any other location/job. An error message should show. If this is not a duplicate on a database level - check if there are any enhancements/modifications to the gateway service.
  2. Try to assign the risks to a risk assessment project. From the risk assessment project, you can delete/void one of the identified risks.

With kind regards,

Michael

entry.title: Version Management in PR created from CJ20N Project services
entry.content: I have a doubt in version management. I have a customer, who is creating PR from CJ20N project builder, and the version management is active for the PR, where they want the short text field to be mandatory. AS they are creating THE PR from projects, here there is no field to add the version short text so it is not allowing them to save the PR from CJ20N. Is there any workaround possible other than making the version short text field as a optional entry. Kindly them me with this query.

entry.title: Re: Am not able to modify loginDisabled attribute for my...
entry.content:
Resolved:
I was missing modifier [allownull=true] It worked

Thanks,

Jayant S

entry.title: Re: SUM Roadmap Error

SS

entry.title: How To change the eMAil ID of S-user?
entry.content:
Current S-user E-mail address is old and need to change to a new one.

Please advise how we can manage this in future on its own. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How To change the eMAil ID of S-user?
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Kindly know S-users can no longer manage their own email addresses in SAP for Me, only the administrators can. Also, administrators cannot change their own email addresses either, so another administrator must do this for them.

Product support engineer can not change email for S-user when there are active administrators.

So please kindly contact your company's Super Administrators, User Administrators, or Cloud Administrators (listed here) to change your S-user ID email address for them in the User Management application.

If the affected S-user is linked to SAP Universal ID, the user must first add the new email address to their UID in the SAP Universal ID Account Manager by following the steps in KBA 2882908.

Please refer to KBA 3108466 - How to update the email address for S-user IDs - SAP for Me.

Thanks and regards,
Joanna

entry.title: Re: SDK Code in Hana
entry.content:
Hi ramco1917,

It can be done something as below:

 

Query = @"SELECT IFNULL(SUM(""U_PKGWGHT"") + SUM(""U_BAGWGHT""), 0) AS ""BAGWGHT"" FROM " + TEST.HanaDBName + @".""@PACKINGTABLE"" WHERE ""U_BAGNUM"" = '" + MYBAGNUM + "'";
SAPbobsCOM.Recordset oRs = ((SAPbobsCOM.Recordset)(oCompany.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.BoRecordset)));
oRs.DoQuery(Query);

 

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Apps not available in FRUN launchpad

entry.title: Re: Joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Setup Guide

Thank you for sharing this post!

Best regards,

Mio

entry.title: How to configure event for Metric "Number of Users" in Health Monitoring
entry.content:
Which event can be chosen for raising an alert for metric "Number of Users" in Health Monitoring in Cloud ALM?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to configure event for Metric "Number of Users" i...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

SAP Cloud ALM for Operations separates the metric issue response flow into three parts : 

- The metric data collection.
- The metric value comparison to the threshold values.
- The events to generate alerts/e-mails in response to the metric value passing a threshold.

There is not always a 1 to 1 match between a metric and an event.
Some metrics are "bundled" into a shared pre-built event category.
And other metrics do not yet have a pre-built event category available for them. 

There is a mapping between metrics and events, however this mapping is not one-to-one.
And not every metric corresponds an event.

For Metric "Number of Users", there is a metric, but no associated event to raise an alert. Only a red rating would be possible in case a certain threshold is exceeded.

Best regards,
Ellie
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: How to map hospital equipments in SAP EAM?
entry.content:
This depends on how you might model the 'owner' / 'utilizer' to which the cost would ave to be assigned.

Are you using goods movements to move the equis around?

entry.title: Re: How to use lock objects in Developer Extensibility
entry.content:
I will explain the original requirements I want to achieve in more detail.

I want to develop a program that registers certain business data using the BORAP façade. In doing so, I plan to store the interfaced data of the original data to be registered in a custom table. After the business data registration is complete, I want to add the registration result information of the business data to the custom table.

At this time, I wanted to execute the commit for the registration/update of the business data and the custom table at the same time to prevent one from being incomplete. I have confirmed that the EML specifications allow for simultaneous commit, and that the RAP mechanism automatically locks while MODIFY ENTITIES~ is running.

However, I decided that simultaneous commit would be difficult for the following reasons. This is because I confirmed that the most typical registration results returned to the REPORTED parameter are returned at the time of commit (COMMIT ENTITIES), not when MODIFY ENTITIES~ is processed. I wanted to update the custom table according to the registration result of the business data, so I decided that simultaneous commit was not possible with this requirement.

Therefore, as an alternative solution to prevent a situation where only one of the two processes fails, we came up with the following processing order and investigated a method of explicitly initiating the lock process.

1. Lock the custom table using a lock object

2. MODIFY ENTITIES business data

3. COMMIT ENTITIES business data

4. Obtain and edit the processing results

5. MODIFY ENTITIES custom table

6. COMMIT ENTITIES custom table

7. Unlock the custom table

entry.title: Re: SAP QM - Result recording - Status
entry.content:
Greetings,

I have never heard of status influencing sample size so I tried to replicate your scenario. If I try to record results in QA02 or QE51N transaction, system offers only 8 slots for results recording.

The following message is displayed by SAP.

Try to use  use transaction QE73 - results recording for master inspection characteristic. SAP offers 10 slots for results recording as proposed by sampling procedure.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: Create Subscription Quote Based On a Specific Configu...
entry.content: Deepak, I'll use to test the scenario as suggested and share the results but if I correctly understand the usage of configuration date, the BOM - Bill of Materials are exploded based on the passed date to the configuration date. As an example: Char A with value A1 has a material CA1 effective from 1/1/2024 and change in material CA1_01 effective from 1/1/2025 then based on the configuration date the material to be exploded between CA1 vs CA1_01 is determined, that's my understanding. In the requested scenario we want to influence the product configuration itself based on the simulation date. The subscription order to be created based on the production configuration that is active on the specified date rather than the current system date.

entry.title: Re: Updating PurchaseDownPayments with a service layer error: "Unallowed item cost [DPO1.INMPri
entry.content:
I reproduced this problem in SBODEMOCN

1、POTS https://{{IP}}:50000/b1s/v1/PurchaseDownPayments

 

{
    "DocDate": "2024-12-24",
    "TaxDate": "2024-12-24",
    "DocDueDate": "2024-12-24",
    "PriceMode": "pmdGross",
    "DownPaymentType": "dptRequest",
    "CardCode": "V10000",
    "DocTotal": 441.6,
    "DocumentLines": [
        {
            "InventoryQuantity": 1,
            "TaxTotal": 28.99,
            "ItemCode": "A00001",
            "VatGroup": "J1",
            "LineNum": 0,
            "BaseType": -1,
            "Price": 11.150442,
            "PriceAfterVAT": 12.6,
            "LineTotal": 223.01,
            "GrossTotal": 252,
            "UnitsOfMeasurment": 1
        },
        {
            "InventoryQuantity": 1,
            "TaxTotal": 34.51,
            "ItemCode": "A00002",
            "VatGroup": "J2",
            "LineNum": 1,
            "BaseType": -1,
            "Price": 8.849558,
            "PriceAfterVAT": 10.0,
            "LineTotal": 265.49,
            "GrossTotal": 300,
            "UnitsOfMeasurment": 1
        }
    ]
}

 

2、PATCH https://{{IP}}:50000/b1s/v1/PurchaseDownPayments(DocEntry)

 

{
    "DocDate": "2024-12-24",
    "TaxDate": "2024-12-24",
    "DocDueDate": "2024-12-24",
    "PriceMode": "pmdGross",
    "DownPaymentType": "dptRequest",
    "CardCode": "V10000",
    "DocTotal": 552.0,
    "DocumentLines": [
        {
            "InventoryQuantity": 1,
            "TaxTotal": 28.99,
            "ItemCode": "A00001",
            "VatGroup": "J1",
            "LineNum": 0,
            "BaseType": -1,
            "Price": 11.150442,
            "PriceAfterVAT": 12.6,
            "LineTotal": 223.01,
            "GrossTotal": 252,
            "UnitsOfMeasurment": 1
        },
        {
            "InventoryQuantity": 1,
            "TaxTotal": 34.51,
            "ItemCode": "A00002",
            "VatGroup": "J2",
            "LineNum": 1,
            "BaseType": -1,
            "Price": 8.849558,
            "PriceAfterVAT": 10.0,
            "LineTotal": 265.49,
            "GrossTotal": 300,
            "UnitsOfMeasurment": 1
        }
    ]
}

entry.title: Re: AI in 2025 - predictions or guessing game
entry.content:
Great article. In addition, I would like to bet on:
1. Small Language Model(SLM): Small and specialized LMs will take the spaces of vertical industries, and the long tails etc., while the LLM remains dominant for general-purpose. And these SLMs should also be adapted with custom data by fine-tuning.

2. More cost-efficience of LLMs training: Cost efficiency of LLM training is a major concern of LLM vendors. DeepSeek V3 has reduced the training of computing capacity by 10 times as LLaMa 3 with comparable performance as a Xmas gift, which we will expect to see more competition on this trend of training efficiency.

3. Awareness of Data Sovereignty: Expect more act on Data Sovereignty on national level.

entry.title: Re: BAPI to create handling units in SAP EWM?
entry.content:
Hello @scottcarricknwn 

To my knowledge BAPI_HU_CREATE creates ERP HUs, not EWM ones. It is easy to mix them up when you have embedded EWM deployment. 

EWM HUs can be managed with the /SCWM/CL_WM_PACKING class.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

Ali

entry.title: Re: How to use lock objects in Developer Extensibility
entry.content: The RAP BO for custom table is managed or unmanaged? Have you tried the explict EML SET LOCKS to lock the custom table? And how you verify the locking is failed? execute the program parallelly?

entry.title: Re: How to map hospital equipments in SAP EAM?
entry.content:
Greetings,

such scenarios can be adequately mapped in standard SAP. The scenario you have described is no different to any dynamic production shop floor environment where different equipment (production resources and tools) migrate between different static locations (superior machine or functional location).

You can map all you different hospital equipment by either equipment type or technical object type. Regarding movements you have three general options:

  • installation and deinstallation of equipment at superior equipment or functional location
  • map equipment to material using serial numbers and track movements with material movements
  • combination of above

Maintenance costs are managed using maintenance orders. Costs can be analysed and summarized at different levels using asset management and/or controlling  structure

Best regards, M,

entry.title: Re: Exploring the RSS feeds of the new SAP Community platform
entry.content:
@rkaouass i can offer you this as alternative i developed my self where you can filter as you like. The feed is generated on the fly and not pregenerated:

https://rss-scn.marianzeis.de/api-docs/#/default/get_api_messages

For example for "ABAP Development" blog posts the URL would be 
https://rss-scn.marianzeis.de/api/messages?conversation.style=blog&managedTag.id=833755570260738661924709785639136

entry.title: Re: Facing issue with BTP CI/CD Pipeline Initialization
entry.content:
Hi Sravani,

Looks like you try to access your repo via user/password, while access via personal access token or SSH key seems to be required. For more information, see Token authentication requirements for Git operations - The GitHub Blog.

If you using SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery serivce for your pipeline, create a new credential using one of the supported authentication methods (e.g. personal access token), assign this new credential to your repository and try again.

I hope this helps!

Best regards,
Boris

entry.title: Change new formulation new tax base
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently our government changes formulation for tax base value.

Previous formulation was 100% from base value, but in 2025 formulation changed to (11/12) x base value. Please give us a solution for this requirement.

Dr. 01.   AR Customer     1,110,000
Cr. 50      Revenue          916,667 (=11/12*1.000.000)
Cr. 50      AP VAT Out     110,000 (Rate 12%)


Regards,

Ruben

entry.title: Re: How to update the Passord Policy of IAS users via RES...
entry.content:
It is not possible to update a user's password policy.
The policy is determined based on the applications a user accessed in the past.
User's psw policy is determined by that application with the strongest policy required. 
In that way it is ensured that after psw change a user can access all of his applications without being bothered again to update his password.
Marko

entry.title: Control for the supplier invoice
entry.content:
Hi,

In (Create Supplier invoice app), there is a option to post the expense against the Work packages of Customer project. I need to know that if I post any expenses for (Eg) Travel or Accommodation without planning in the work package, I should have a control that it should be not invoiced. But when I create the invoice for the Expense which I haven't planned in the project, I'm able to post. So, is there any other way to control this activity.

entry.title: PCA:The customer is using a private IP address (192.168.0.0/22).
entry.content:
The old article had this:

>The usage of the following IP ranges needs an exceptional approval by SAP:
>192.168.200.0/22
>192.168.100.0/22
>192.168.0.0/22

Will we definitely obtain this exceptional approval, or is there a possibility that it could be denied?

entry.title: Re: MDG - Edition Concept
entry.content:
Dear Senthil,

Greetings,

Subject: Edition 

We are using S4Hana 2023 MDG ( Co-Deployed). Project is Indian- Power Sector. Kindly advise to Consider the Edition (Financial Year/Date) . for example E1,E2,E3,E4. Master Data Is given from 2024 March till 2024 November end. Still IDOC or SoA yet to implement by programmerr. Could you please Advise how to implement the Editon. it is prority

Shall i consider the Edition from 1st March .

entry.title: Re: How to update data in custom facet with the use of da...
entry.content: Thank you Jayant for this useful information.

entry.title: Re: Consume CDS CAP oData Service by Workzone UI Integrat...
entry.content:
@ahmet_pelit in the meantime I am creating the destination objects via mta on subaccount / instance level automatically using destination content option as described below:

The name given in "sap.cloud.service" is the same as defined in srv module definition section

The parameter set in package.json are obsolete in that case because the destination is recreated after each deployment automatically!

Hope this helps. In case of question, please send me a private message

BR

entry.title: Re: How to update data in custom facet with the use of da...
entry.content: You can close the question after accepting the solution if you are able to resolve it.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi @Mkumaran , 

I'm sorry but support for individual features is beyond the scope of this blog post. You could try posting a new question to the ABAP Development forum:

SAP Community - ABAP Development forum 

Best wishes,

Julie PLummer.

entry.title: Re: Maintain multiple credit limit in single credit segment
entry.content:
Hi Zaida,

No. It is not possible to set multiple credit limit in single credit segment.
One segment = one limit.

Best Regards,
Emöke
SAP Support - FSCM-CR

entry.title: Re: Automatic HU creation after exception code NEXT
entry.content: Hi @Michael_Kok, we unfortunately had to go to a custom made solution in RF which created the HU when using NEXT if i recall correctly. Good luck

entry.title: Re: In SAC Data Wrangler, can I generate multiple rows of...
entry.content:
@VivekD 

Unfortunately you cannot in Data Wrangling but this should be easy to do in SAC Advance Formula. A simple logic to post 1 whenever the date is within the start and end date.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Create attachment (photo) with personas on SE on mobile doesn't work
entry.content: Hello, does the error also occur when attempting to upload via the mobile menu at the bottom right of the image?

entry.title: How to: Adding Product Hierarchy to analytical CDS Views
entry.content:
In the following post, I will show you how to extend the CDS version of the Fiori App: Market Segments - Actuals and Market Segments - Plan/Actual. This can be, however, used for any CDS View if you know the name of the CDS view. 

Please change the naming of the sqlViewAppendName and the WITH statement based on your naming convention, as every name must be unique.

First of all, you need to extend this CDS View E_JournalEntryItem and E_FinancialPlanningEntryItem:

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'ZXXEJOURNALITEM'
@EndUserText.label: 'Extension for View E_JournalEntryItem'
extend view E_JournalEntryItem with ZXX_JOURNALENTRYITEM_PRODHPA
association [0..1] to I_ProductHierarchy as _ProductHierarchy on $projection.prodh_pa = _ProductHierarchy.ProductHierarchy
association [0..1] to I_ProductHierarchyText as _ProductHierarchyText
    on $projection.prodh_pa = _ProductHierarchyText.ProductHierarchy
association [0..1] to I_SalesOffice as _SalesOffice on $projection.vkbur_pa = _SalesOffice.SalesOffice
association [0..1] to I_SalesOfficeText as _SalesOfficeText on $projection.vkbur_pa = _SalesOfficeText.SalesOfficeName
{
  @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_ProductHierarchy'
  Persistence.prodh_pa as prodh_pa,
  
  @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_SalesOffice'
  Persistence.vkbur_pa as vkbur_pa,
  _ProductHierarchy,
  _ProductHierarchyText,
  _SalesOffice,
  _SalesOfficeText
}

 

 

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'ZXXEJOURNALITEM'
@EndUserText.label: 'Extension for View E_FinancialPlanEntIt'
extend view E_FinancialPlanningEntryItem with ZXX_E_Financialplanningentr
association [0..1] to I_ProductHierarchy as _ProductHierarchy on $projection.prodh_pa = _ProductHierarchy.ProductHierarchy
association [0..1] to I_ProductHierarchyText as _ProductHierarchyText
    on $projection.prodh_pa = _ProductHierarchyText.ProductHierarchy
{
  @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_ProductHierarchy'
  Persistence.prodh_pa as prodh_pa,
  _ProductHierarchy,
  _ProductHierarchyText
}

 

 

This way, you will enable it for the I_JournalEntryItemCube and I_ActualPlanJrnlEntryItemCube. However, these two need to be extended as well. The first extension was just to propagate the field.

Now you need to do these two extensions for I_JournalEntryItemCube and I_ActualPlanJrnlEntryItemCube:

 

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'ZXXIJRNLENTITCU'
@EndUserText.label: 'Extension of I_JournalEntryItemCube of Prodh_PA/VKBUR_PA'
extend view I_JournalEntryItemCube with  ZXX_I_JournaEntryItCuProdHier
association [0..1] to I_ProductHierarchy as _ProductHierarchy on $projection.prodh_pa = _ProductHierarchy.ProductHierarchy
association [0..1] to I_ProductHierarchyText as _ProductHierarchyText
    on $projection.prodh_pa = _ProductHierarchyText.ProductHierarchy
association [0..1] to I_SalesOffice as _SalesOffice on $projection.vkbur_pa = _SalesOffice.SalesOffice
association [0..1] to I_SalesOfficeText as _SalesOfficeText on $projection.vkbur_pa = _SalesOfficeText.SalesOfficeName
{
  @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_ProductHierarchy'
  _Extension.prodh_pa,
  
  @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_SalesOffice'
  _Extension.vkbur_pa,

  _ProductHierarchy,
  _ProductHierarchyText,
  _SalesOffice,
  _SalesOfficeText
}
@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'ZXXJRNITMCUBE'
@EndUserText.label: 'Journal Entry cube extension'
extend view I_ActualPlanJrnlEntryItemCube with ZXX_PRODH_PA
association [0..1] to I_ProductHierarchy as _ProductHierarchy on $projection.prodh_pa = _ProductHierarchy.ProductHierarchy
association [0..*] to I_ProductHierarchyText as _ProductHierarchyText
    on $projection.prodh_pa = _ProductHierarchyText.ProductHierarchy
{
   .textArrangement: #TEXT_FIRST
    @AbapCatalog.compiler.caseJoin
    @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_ProductHierarchy'
   case 
    when APJEI.ActualPlanCode ='A'
        then _Extension_acdoca.prodh_pa
    when APJEI.ActualPlanCode ='P'
        then _Extension_acdocp.prodh_pa
   end as prodh_pa,
  _ProductHierarchy,
  _ProductHierarchyText
}

 

With this you are now able to use both fields in the cubes. As the last step you will extend the consumption CDS view. 

This extension is for C_MarketSegmentsQ2501 which is Market Segments - Actuals.

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'ZXXMARKETPLAN'
@EndUserText.label: 'market segment ext'
extend view C_MarketSegmentQ2501  with ZFO_E_MarketSegmentQ2501
{
  @AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #FREE
  @AnalyticsDetails.query.totals: #SHOW
  @AnalyticsDetails.query.display: #KEY_TEXT
  prodh_pa,
  
  @AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #FREE
  @AnalyticsDetails.query.totals: #SHOW
  @AnalyticsDetails.query.display: #KEY_TEXT
  vkbur_pa
    
}

 

 

 

 

 This extension is for C_MarketSegmentsPlanActQ2501 which is Market Segments - Plan/Actuals.

 

 

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'ZXXMARKETACTPLAN'
@EndUserText.label: 'Market Segments - Plan/Actuals - Ext PRODH_PA'
extend view C_MarketSegmentPlanActQ2501 with ZXX_E_MarketSegmentsPlanAct

{
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #FREE
@AnalyticsDetails.query.totals: #SHOW
@AnalyticsDetails.query.display: #KEY_TEXT

prodh_pa

}

 

When you have all these extensions in your system you will see the Product Hierarchy with description in the query, if selected.

Result of extensions in Market Segments - Actuals

entry.title: batch Expiry date based on 101?
entry.content:
in my SAP HANA system SLED is calculated for batches produced with PP-PI process orders when the order is released. SLED is calculated as Release date (batch creation) + shelf life in MM views in the batch creation step.

Sometimes the production (101 with MIGO) is done not immediately, but some days later. Those produced materials have a very short shelf life, maybe a month.  

So, my question is: Can the SLED date be calculated with the first 101 production in MIGO instead? Or at least, that the first 101 could overwrite the SLED date automatically entered when the batch was created in the release step of the Process order?

entry.title: Re: SOP in the SAP Public Cloud system
entry.content:
Hello @amelihsahin 

As per note 2268064 - S4TWL - Sales and Operation Planning SOP is being replaced with IBP Integrated Business Planning in S/4HANA.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Need Organization chart in SAC to display the organiz...
entry.content:
@aliraza094 

SAC does not have  a native organization chart. You can explore R package support for the org chart.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Thoughts About Generative AI in Master Data Governance
entry.content:
Reciprocal Relationship Between Master Data Governance and Generative Artificial Intelligence

In this blog post, I'd like to point out how generative AI impacts master data management and vice versa.

Master Data Governance Facilitating Generative Artificial Intelligence

In simple terms, generative AI is meant to automatically create reliable output in response to user prompts. With regards to master data governance there are multiple dimensions to this. On the one hand, master data governance is the foundation that ensures clean, consistent, and reliable master data, which is crucial for fact-based decision-making and flawless business transactions across organizations. Such a foundation is also pivotal in an AI context. Any generative AI output depends on the quality of the underlying source data from large language models (LLM). In a business context, training data is often based on corporate data, including master data. Poor data quality can lead to so-called AI hallucinations (like what is known as "garbage in/garbage" out from an analytical perspective). This means in a nutshell that the accuracy of LLM-derived responses depends heavily on the quality of the prompts and the underlying data quality itself.. This simply means that the importance of effective master data governance becomes even more relevant when generative AI is applied in a business context, in which master data provides a critical foundation. To find out more about the role of master data governance in an AI context, read this article or listen to this podcast.

Generative Artificial Intelligence Facilitating Master Data Governance 

On the other hand, state-of-the art master data governance must be able to cope with challenges such as processing large data volumes with as little manual intervention as possible. And the good thing is that SAP Master Data Governance features various means to this end already, for example:

  • ML-based rule mining for the automated detection of hidden patterns in master data and the resulting proposal and definition of additional data quality rules
  • Derivation rules for automated field population
  • Data provider integration for the automated take-over of proven source data

Now, with SAP Master Data Governance on SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition, the use of generative AI is an additional capability to support automation and consumer-grade user experience.

Note: You may also watch the SAP let’s talk data podcast about the value of automation in MDM (with Andreas Seifried)

Generative AI in central governance (classic mode)

Generative AI is applied in central governance (classic mode) for summary of changes and assisted changes. To get an idea of how this works, watch the short video:

Video showing gen AI applied in central governance (classic mode)To watch the video, click on the picture above. 

Generative AI in business partner processing (cloud-ready mode)

In addition, generative AI can be used in business partner processing (cloud-ready mode) initiated by user prompts using the SAP Joule copilot.

User prompts in Joule copilot and follow-ups in MDG

 This integration enables:

  • User prompts and dialog in natural language with AI copilot Joule to get details on business partner data.
  • Option to directly call MDG for follow-up processing in cloud-ready mode.

The AI features described in this blog post are only available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition (not in the on-premise version).

As pointed out before, the impact of a consistent master data layer for generative AI based output is huge while the journey of AI integration in SAP Master Data Governance processes has only just begun. There is more to come. Stay tuned. 

Best,
Markus

entry.title: How to configure attachment type for custom BO in C4C?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

 

I want to configure attachment type dropdown list for custom BO, developed in SDK.

As in the pre delivered usage type Standard BOs are there so i can use newly created attachment type in standard BO but how i can use in custom BO?

Default attachment types are coming in custom BO. 

 

How to achive this using SDK ?

C4C Extensibility SAP Cloud Applications Studio C4C Sales C4C Service

entry.title: Re: My CAP Projects Toolbox
entry.content:
Hi @vvdries , nice post! 

You were looking for some input on the use of the `cds.odata` functions `urlify` and `parse`. While they both don't begin with an underscore (a conventional way of signifying something is off-limits, as I'm sure you know), they are not explicitly documented in Capire* and are therefore deemed to be not for external use. Of course, digging in to the source code and learning about these functions (and how they work, and perhaps more importantly how they also help to clarify the relationship between CQN and the OData protocol adapter, in this example) is great.

*There is one reference, as far as I can find, but it's just in passing and only in a release note entry

HTH!

DJ

entry.title: CM25 - Do not allow orders to start so close to a non-working day that they cant finish
entry.content:
Hi 

When I look in CM25, a lot of non-dispatched orders look longer than they really are, because they suggest to start them at a time where they can't be finished before a non-working day. Is there a setting somewhere to stop the system from doing this? I bet there is somewhere maybe in the strategy but I cant find it.

entry.title: Re: Create attachment (photo) with personas on SE on mobile doesn't work
entry.content: Yes, via the mobile menu and after "service for object", the same message appears very shortly.

entry.title: Re: Katowice - SAP Stammtisch 08.01.2025
entry.content:
Hi Ewelina!

Of course I will keep proposing to include in the meetings' agenda Fridays from time to time.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration - Cloud Foundry
entry.content: Always make sure the user in question has completely refreshed their browser through Ctrl+F5 or just even closing and re-opening the browser completely.

entry.title: Re: #COE#BUMA CPI Monitoring. Automation for extracting e...
entry.content:
Hello @BUMA ,

Thank you for your question.

Yes, you can create a monitoring dashboard in SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) to list the long-running processes and error messages. However, the standard monitoring capabilities of SAP CPI do not provide a direct way to export the error messages to an Excel file.

For this, you might need to use the SAP CPI OData API to fetch the error messages and then export them to an Excel file. This would require some development effort to create a custom application that uses the API to fetch the data and export it to Excel.

For monitoring long-running iFlows, you can use the Message Processing Log in the Operations view of your SAP CPI tenant. This provides information about the processing status of each iFlow, including whether it has been processed successfully or not.

You can also set up alerts in SAP CPI to notify you when an iFlow takes longer than expected to process. This can be done by setting a threshold for the processing time of each iFlow, and then configuring an alert to be sent when this threshold is exceeded.

In addition, SAP offers the SAP Cloud ALM for operations scenario which provides enhanced monitoring and alerting capabilities for SAP CPI. This includes a dashboard that provides an overview of the status of your iFlows, including any errors or long-running processes.

Remember, you would need the necessary permissions to access these features in SAP CPI.

Best Regards

Dave

entry.title: Re: Output Management for Sales Order at item level using BRF+ technique
entry.content: Hi Pavithra, Can you please share information on how you achieved item level output using BRF plus ? I also have similar requirement of item level output using BRF plus in sales order.

entry.title: Query Pending Workflow Details via entity TodoV2 API
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Hope everyone doing fine.

I got requirement from customer to query all pending workflows in SF with all changed data old value and new value, and expecting to do action approve and reject via custom application.

So what we currently do is, we use ToDo V2 entity to get pending workflows where categoryId= '14' and '17' as per reference here 

This is how it looks like via posman.

{
    "d": {
        "results": [
            {
                "__metadata": {
                    "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequest(918L)",
                    "type": "SFOData.WfRequest"
                },
                "wfRequestId": "918",
                "lastModifiedDateTime": "/Date(1731983617000+0000)/",
                "lastModifiedBy": "61111467",
                "module": "HRIS",
                "reminderSentDate": null,
                "totalSteps": 9,
                "createdDateTime": "/Date(1731983617000+0000)/",
                "createdOn": "/Date(1731983617000)/",
                "url": null,
                "lastModifiedOn": "/Date(1731983617000)/",
                "parentWfRequestId": null,
                "createdBy": "61111467",
                "currentStepNum": 1,
                "status": "PENDING",
                "wfRequestUINav": {
                    "__deferred": {
                        "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequest(918L)/wfRequestUINav"
                    }
                },
                "parentWfRequestNav": {
                    "__deferred": {
                        "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequest(918L)/parentWfRequestNav"
                    }
                },
                "workflowAllowedActionListNav": {
                    "__deferred": {
                        "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequest(918L)/workflowAllowedActionListNav"
                    }
                },
                "empWfRequestNav": {
                    "__deferred": {
                        "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequest(918L)/empWfRequestNav"
                    }
                },
                "wfRequestParticipatorNav": {
                    "__deferred": {
                        "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequest(918L)/wfRequestParticipatorNav"
                    }
                },
                "wfRequestCommentsNav": {
                    "__deferred": {
                        "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequest(918L)/wfRequestCommentsNav"
                    }
                },
                "wfRequestStepNav": {
                    "__deferred": {
                        "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequest(918L)/wfRequestStepNav"
                    }
                }
            }
        ]
    }
}

 then, we navigate to wfrequestUINav, and it will be look like this.

{
    "d": {
        "__metadata": {
            "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequestUIData(918L)",
            "type": "SFOData.WfRequestUIData"
        },
        "wfRequestId": "918",
        "businessUnit": null,
        "isEffectiveDateType": true,
        "isObjectBase": false,
        "assigneeUserId": null,
        "operateUserName": "MUHAMAD IRFAN TAUFIQ",
        "assigneeUserName": null,
        "jobTitle": "OPERATOR TP(17100182)",
        "legalEntity": null,
        "objectType": null,
        "division": null,
        "receivedOn": null,
        "department": null,
        "costCenter": null,
        "deeplink": "https://hcm-ap20-preview.hr.cloud.sap/sf/hrisworkflowapprovelink?workflowRequestId=V4-0-a1-jeRuUg-UbT1cXjxSysAAPkZFfnfud_mgVo-nr1T1eQ&prevPage=HOME&company=ptpamapersT1&username=SFAPI",
        "todoSubjectLine": "MUTASI for ANTONIUS AGUNG TEGUH SURYADI",
        "operateType": "Initiated",
        "subjectUserId": "61102176",
        "changedData": null,
        "eventReason": "MUTASI",
        "actionType": null,
        "isAssigned": false,
        "operateUserId": "61111467",
        "objectName": null,
        "location": "BTSJ",
        "actions": "[{\"action\":\"approve\"}]",
        "operateDate": "November 19, 2024",
        "effectiveDate": "October 1, 2024",
        "subjectUserName": "ANTONIUS AGUNG TEGUH SURYADI"
    }
}

 and the client expectation is to get similar changed data old value and new value as picture below which is not populated in wfrequestUIData

So my question is, is this expected behavior? we cannot fetched data via API as picture above? only use deeplink?

 

Thank you!
Reza Dwi

entry.title: Manual Assignment of Loading and Truck Resource to FO
entry.content:
Hi All,

I would like to share my working experience on custom development for Transportation Management Optimization, SAP has already provided standard Fiori app to perform optimization, however we don't have any GUI based single step solution to perform optimization in TM.

Requirement: We received requirement from business team, to design simple SAP ABAP program to perform TM Optimization automation. based on inputs: Freight Unit, Sending Location, Receiving location, Planning Profile.

Pre-requisite: ABAP Development and BOBF Development and functional skills needed to perform above activity.

Following are the process steps:

  1. An Automatic Freight Unit is created in SAP TM, from an ERP STO document.
  2. Transportation Planning is performed and Freight Order is created from FU document.
  3. Transportation planning utilizes the optimizer engines like – TVSR/ VSR (Vehicle Resource Scheduling) and assigns a truck resource and loading resource to the Freight Order, according to the input variables from Freight Unit document.
  4. But, in case there is no loading slot available, enough to accommodate the loading activity of the Freight Order or, there is no available truck resource during the FU -> pick up window date/ time, then a manual planning is performed in the Transportation Cockpit window.
  5. But, in manual planning, only a truck resource is assigned not the loading resource.
  6. For the resolution for this business requirement, a custom manual optimization button is created, which would assign an appropriate truck resource (truck having 100% utilization for the selected FU) and a loading resource is assigned according to the prioritized sequence for the loading plant and product combination.
  7. First FO document is created against the FU, by selecting the FU and calling the standard action of the business object – TOR -> sub-node - STOP_SUCC -> action - AUTOPLAN_STAGE.
  8. Above action will create a Freight Order and assign it to the Freight Unit.
  9. Afterwards, select the newly created FO and call the action -> ASSIGN_VEHICLE_RES for assigning the truck resource at BO – TOR -> sub-node – ROOT.
  10. Once the truck resource is assigned, loading/ handling resource can be assigned to this Freight Order, with start load time, similar to FU pick up window start date/ time. Further 15 mins. of loading time is ended in start date/ time leading to load end date/ time.
  11. This would complete the manual optimization process, with a single button.

Logic: Get the all fright unit DB keys from the from the Transparent Table /SCMTMS/D_TORROT based on Document, pass all the DB keys to helper class /scmtms/cl_tor_helper_read  method GET_TOR_DATA to read Logistical Stop Successor Stage data

 

/scmtms/cl_tor_helper_read=>get_tor_data(
  EXPORTING
    it_root_key                     =  int_key                " Key Table
  IMPORTING
    et_stop_succ                   = DATA(int_stop_succ)      " Logistical Stop Successor = Stage
).

 

Using these data, get the Planning Profile data /SCMTMS/D_PLAPRO and call standard action from freight unit -> AUTOPLAN_STAGE

 

"Get instance of service manager TOR
DATA(lo_tor_srvmgr) = /bobf/cl_tra_serv_mgr_factory=>get_service_manager( /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_bo_key ).
"Get instance for transaction manager
CALL METHOD /bobf/cl_tra_trans_mgr_factory=>get_transaction_manager
  RECEIVING
    eo_transaction_manager = DATA(lo_txn_mgr). " Standalone Transaction Manager Instance
CREATE DATA lr_create_capa_param.

SELECT SINGLE * INTO (wa_plapro) FROM /scmtms/d_plapro WHERE profile_id = @p_pro.

IF sy-subrc  = 0.
  MOVE-CORRESPONDING wa_plapro TO lr_create_capa_param->plan_prof  .
ENDIF.
TRY.
    "Call action From FU -> STOP_SUCC -> AUTOPLAN_STAGE action
    lo_tor_srvmgr->do_action(
      EXPORTING
          iv_act_key           = /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_action-stop_successor-autoplan_stage
          it_key               = int_fo_key
          is_parameters        = lr_create_capa_param
      IMPORTING
          eo_change                = DATA(lo_change)
          eo_message               = DATA(fo_message)
          et_failed_key            = DATA(lt_failed_key)
          et_failed_action_key     = DATA(lt_failed_action_key)
          ev_static_action_failed  = DATA(int_static_action_failed)
          et_data                  = lt_tor_root
          et_data_link             = DATA(int_data_link)
    ).
  CATCH /bobf/cx_frw_contrct_violation INTO DATA(lx_exc). " Caller violates a BOPF contract
ENDTRY.

lo_txn_mgr->save(
  IMPORTING
    ev_rejected = DATA(lv_re)            " Data element for domain BOOLE: TRUE (='X') and FALSE (=' ')
    eo_message  = fo_message                " Interface for transaction change objects
).

 

After saving the action, Now get the freight order details against freight unit /SCMTMS/D_TORITE inner join /SCMTMS/D_TORROT

 

"Get Freight Order aginst Freight Unit number
SELECT SINGLE b~db_key, b~tor_id, a~gro_vol_val, a~src_loc_keytrq, a~des_loc_keytrq
   INTO (wa_tor_fo)
   FROM /scmtms/d_torite AS a
   INNER JOIN /scmtms/d_torrot AS b
   ON a~parent_key = b~db_key
   WHERE a~fu_root_key = _tor_fu_key
   AND a~item_cat = 'PRD'
   AND b~tor_cat = 'TO'.

 

 

Assign vehicle to the freight order: Action For Assign Truck Resource to Freight Order.
If the Truck Resource ID is Available the perform the action to assign.

 

          "  action – ASSIGN_VEHICLE_RES, on Freight Order object – ROOT node, with VEH_KEY as TMSRESUID
          lo_tor_srvmgr->do_action(
            EXPORTING
              iv_act_key    = /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_action-root-assign_vehicle_res
              it_key        = int_fo_key
              is_parameters = lr_assign_vehicle_res
            IMPORTING
              eo_change     = lo_change
              eo_message    = fo_message
              et_failed_key = lt_failed_key
          ).

          lo_txn_mgr->save(
            IMPORTING
              ev_rejected = lv_re            " Data element for domain BOOLE: TRUE (='X') and FALSE (=' ')
              eo_message  = fo_message       " Interface for transaction change objects
          ).

 

If The Truck Resource ID in Not Available the Perform the action which will cancel the,
Created Fright order against the Selected Freight Unit.

 

 

*-- Action to Cancle Frieght Order
          CALL METHOD lo_tor_srvmgr->do_action
            EXPORTING
              iv_act_key    = /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_action-root- remove_tor_assignments
              it_key        = int_fo_key
            IMPORTING
              eo_change     = lo_change
              eo_message    = fo_message
              et_failed_key = lt_failed_key.

          lo_txn_mgr->save(
            IMPORTING
              ev_rejected = lv_re            " Data element for domain BOOLE: TRUE (='X') and FALSE (=' ')
              eo_message  = fo_message       " Interface for transaction change objects
          ).
*-- Display Message
          MESSAGE: TEXT-184 TYPE 'S' DISPLAY LIKE 'E'.
          EXIT.

 

Once the truck resource is assigned, loading/ handling resource can be assigned to this Freight Order, with start load time, similar to FU pick up window start date/ time. Further 15 mins. of loading time is ended in start date/ time leading to load end date/ time.

 

       " get all the stop and root data for freight order
        CLEAR: int_stop_key[].
        SELECT db_key INTO TABLE @int_stop_key FROM /scmtms/d_torstp WHERE parent_key = _tor_fo-db_key.

        lo_tor_srvmgr->retrieve(
          EXPORTING
            iv_node_key = /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_node-stop
            it_key      = int_stop_key
          IMPORTING
            et_data     = int_fo_stop ).


        "now set the indicator based on which action we are calling
        LOOP AT int_fo_stop ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_fo_stop>) WHERE stop_cat = 'O'.
          <fs_fo_stop>-assgn_hres = wl_handling_res.
          <fs_fo_stop>-assgn_hres_cons = '1'.

          CONVERT TIME STAMP <fs_fo_stop>-aggr_assgn_start_l TIME ZONE 'UTC' INTO DATE wf_input_date TIME wf_input_time.
          wl_duration = wl_fix_dur.
          wf_hours =   wl_duration+0(2).
          wf_minutes = wl_duration+2(2).
          wf_seconds = wl_duration+4(2).

          CALL FUNCTION 'IGN_TIMESTAMP_PLUSMINUS'
            EXPORTING
              start_date  = wf_input_date
              start_time  = wf_input_time
              forward     = abap_false
              backward    = abap_true
              hours       = wf_hours
              minutes     = wf_minutes
              seconds     = wf_seconds
            IMPORTING
              result_date = wf_output_date
              result_time = wf_output_time.
          IF sy-subrc = 0.
            <fs_fo_stop>-aggr_assgn_start_l = wf_output_date && wf_output_time.
          ENDIF.
        ENDLOOP.

        INSERT /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_node_attribute-stop-assgn_hres      INTO TABLE int_chg_fields.
        INSERT /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_node_attribute-stop-assgn_hres_cons INTO TABLE int_chg_fields.
        INSERT /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_node_attribute-stop-aggr_assgn_start_l INTO TABLE int_chg_fields.

        /scmtms/cl_mod_helper=>mod_update_multi(
          EXPORTING
            it_data           = int_fo_stop
            iv_node           = /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_node-stop
            iv_bo_key         = /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_bo_key
            it_changed_fields = int_chg_fields
          CHANGING
            ct_mod            = int_mod ).

        lo_tor_srvmgr->modify(
          EXPORTING
            it_modification = int_mod ).

        lo_txn_mgr->save(
          IMPORTING
            ev_rejected = lv_re            " Data element for domain BOOLE: TRUE (='X') and FALSE (=' ')
            eo_message  = fo_message       " Interface for transaction change objects
        ).

 

Display success message from the standard messages.

entry.title: Re: Calling Document Extraction API from Integration Suite
entry.content: You need to implement the multi-part upload with custom code. There, is also a content package which contains such implementation. This can be used as starting point. Content: https://api.sap.com/package/SAPAIBusinessServiceDocumentInformationExtraction/integrationflow

entry.title: Re: How to use SAP Content Agent Service (Video)
entry.content:
Hello @SumitKundu,

Does https://dam.sap.com/mac/u/a/fZfZUze.htm?rc=10 (the link behind the screenshot) work for you?

Best regards,
Boris

entry.title: Re: #COE #BUMA Best Practice for distributing Key Extensi...
entry.content:
Hello @BUMA 

Thank you for your question. 

Organizing transport objects and assigning them to the correct software collections is a crucial task in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. Here are some best practices to follow:

1. Categorizing Software Collections: Software collections should be categorized based on the functionality they provide or the business processes they support. For example, you can have separate collections for Finance, Sales, HR, etc. This will help in managing the transport objects more efficiently and will also make it easier to identify and troubleshoot any issues.

2. Assigning Key User Extensibilities: Key user extensibilities should be assigned to software collections based on the roles and responsibilities of the key users. For example, if a key user is responsible for managing the finance processes, then the extensibilities related to finance should be assigned to the software collection for Finance. This will ensure that the key users have access to the necessary tools and functionalities to perform their tasks effectively.

3. Use of Transport Management System (TMS): TMS is a tool provided by SAP to manage the transport objects. It allows you to create, change, and manage transport requests and tasks. It also provides functionalities to import and export transport objects between different SAP systems.

4. Regular Monitoring and Auditing: Regular monitoring and auditing of the transport objects and their assignment to the software collections is necessary to ensure that there are no issues or discrepancies. This will also help in identifying any potential issues or risks and taking corrective actions in a timely manner.

5. Documentation: Proper documentation of the transport objects and their assignment to the software collections is necessary for future reference and for troubleshooting any issues. The documentation should include details like the name of the transport object, its purpose, the software collection it is assigned to, the key users who have access to it, etc.

Best Regards

Dave

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Client 8.00
entry.content:
Hallo @Sandra 

vielen Dank für die Antwort. 
Ich werde das versuchen und mich wieder dazu melden. 

Gruß

Mathias
